notable_excerpts: Not just for us for any bank with salaried accounts, the IT services sector and similar sectors would account for a good share of the salary accounts, because they are a good share of employment in the country, salaried employment in the country. So, far, we have not seen any impact.
As far as the position of CEO is concerned, you are aware that there is still a year to go and the Board will take a view and decide and disclosure will be made at the appropriate time.
Our aim is and what we operate to is the risk-adjusted PPOP and that has to be done in a framework which is sustainable.
The capital position of the Bank continued to be strong with a CET-1 ratio of 16.35% and total capital adequacy ratio of 17.00% at September 30, 2025, including profits for H1-2026.

chain_of_thought: The earnings call transcript for ICICI Bank's Q2 FY26 reveals limited ESG content. There are no mentions of environmental themes. Social aspects are briefly touched upon with a focus on employment impact in the IT sector. Governance is discussed more extensively, with emphasis on risk management, capital adequacy, and board decisions regarding CEO succession.
strengths: Strong governance focus on risk management and capital adequacy.
